chunks.title: Jehoshaphat's Return and Reform
chunks.reason: Narrative of the king returning to Jerusalem, receiving rebuke from Jehu, and initiating spiritual reform.

chunks.title: Appointment of Judges in Cities
chunks.reason: Establishment of judicial systems in fortified cities with specific instructions on divine accountability.

chunks.title: Judicial Council in Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Organization of the central court in Jerusalem with Levites and priests, including final exhortations.
